title: Next.js middleware authorization bypass via x-middleware-subrequest header
description: The Edge runtime sandbox uses a client-supplied x-middleware-subrequest header to track middleware recursion depth. When the header repeats the middleware name MAX_RECURSION_DEPTH (5) times, the runtime short-circuits and returns x-middleware-next: 1, instructing the server to continue without running middleware. An external client can supply this header directly, bypassing any authorization checks the middleware was responsible for.
